text: music-composer | Compose original music for film, games and ads | Includes scoring, theme writing, MIDI orchestration, mixing tips, sample libraries, and DAW workflow guidance for Pro Tools/Logic/Ableton.

code-helper-python | Write, debug and refactor Python code | Covers idiomatic Python 3.11+, common stdlib (json, asyncio, pathlib, dataclasses), pytest patterns, type hints, virtualenv/poetry, and PEP-8 enforcement.
json-toolkit | Parse, validate, transform and query JSON | jq-style filtering, JSON Schema validation, JSONPath, JSON-LD context resolution, plus streaming parsers for large files.
data-formatter | Convert between data formats | CSV/TSV, JSON/JSONL, YAML, TOML, XML, Parquet round-trips with schema inference, Unicode normalization and big-int safety.
sql-query-builder | Author and optimize SQL queries | Postgres/MySQL/SQLite dialects, window functions, CTEs, query plan reading, index recommendation and N+1 detection.
agent-orchestrator | Design multi-step LLM agent loops | Tool schema design, ReAct/Plan-Execute-Reflect patterns, retry/backoff, conversational state, guardrails for sensitive actions.
